title: be going to (do)
desc: 계획된 의도 또는 근거 있는 예측
examples: Probably even if you're going to a work conference or something, you could show the details of the conference, right? For sure. Second one, I think this is the important one. The most important thing here is you don't want to make the impression that you are going to work here and make money. That's what they want to prevent the most. Staying here more than 90 days illegally.

So even if you're coming here for business like work. Don't say, I'm going to make some American dollars. No, no, no, no. That's something that you don't want to save. So to be on the safe side, I'm here on a business trip with my company. The final tip is don't say too much.

title: will / shall
